'''''Sentinel''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ''Sentinel'' was called to [[Raid above Coruscant|intercept]] a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack at the heart of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Communications satellite|surveillance satellite]] network near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] itself. However, it arrived too late to prevent the lone Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] from destroying the satellites and the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] that were [[Space mine/Legends|mining]] the area.

The ''Sentinel'' later guarded a supply depot in [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan D1 sector]]. However the supply depot got attacked by [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Cathleen]] in which it entered hyperspace with the Cathleen in pursuit.

*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
